layout: post
title: "Getting advanced with Google..."
date: 2014-09-06
blogger_url: "https://tjjteachersblog.blogspot.com/2014/09/getting-advanced-with-google.html"
---

<br/>

<img src="data:image/png;base64,"/>

We are now coming into our third year of being a Google Apps for EDU school. Staff are becoming increasingly proficient at using Google tools. But I still frequently come across people who aren't aware of the full power of the package. In light of this, I have set up two hour-long sessions for staff to show them some of the things that might help them further with their jobs.

These are the things I'm going to show them:

<ol>
<li>
<a href="http://vimeo.com/101261736">Google classroom</a>
</li>
<li>
Labs in calendar

<!--more-->

</li>
<li>
Appointment slots in Google calendar
</li>
<li>
How to import the school calendar into your own Google calendar
</li>
<li>
<a href="https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=Q2ROWqKEaqY&amp;feature=youtu.be&amp;ytsession=M4Rt37kdtQiX7YoMr8idtmzXPLkq3DaWOL7TUwvzYra2nUPvUFVyF6pkvr-ysNkFqJ6e1-BSGV9rJifJo1HTAKn3A63jVMRL8PmdPlDsGTH5GQkTa0slNXf03ROqrl9KKKzKVT_aGEidZS0Jc6WzmAcD7YHPG-BppCq2SRVzWZr8uF-z8sztq80zfvEpEzuFLc_E6qVscNAmmGbIRVK29e53d0MCmoMp8eHHRDFo7Q6YHVsNiU2NpgfDK3qbOKqSwKuCQRR_YqukpkdPNtOTD2n8g1Hbj-_YL8ZOjvA6OjqzEJPa8pRIuWXY7aCLderD">How to import a two-week timetable into Google calendar</a>
</li>
<li>
Labs in e-mail
</li>
<li>
<a href="http://www.googlegooru.com/23-google-apps-updates-you-might-have-missed-during-july/">Updates to Google drive</a> - office compatibility mode
</li>
<li>
<a href="http://www.youtube.com/watch?v=95c0OlsjKgU">Import HMTL function in sheets</a>
</li>
<li>
<a href="http://www.youtube.com/watch?v=VxUgXeswDLI">Mail merging from a spreadsheet</a>
</li>
<li>
<a href="http://www.techrepublic.com/blog/google-in-the-enterprise/the-40-most-important-google-apps-keyboard-shortcuts/">Google shortcut key-presses</a>
</li>
<li>
<a href="https://support.google.com/docs/answer/3093331?hl=en&amp;ref_topic=3105411">Google translate</a>
</li>
<li>
<a href="http://www.youtube.com/watch?v=pd1E3wGII7o">Vlookup</a>
</li>

</li>
<li>
<a href="https://support.google.com/drive/answer/3323935?hl=en&amp;ref_topic=2525251">Tracking the activity of files in the new Drive</a>
</li>
</ol>
